title: [Original Design] Anjeong Dialogue Method (AD): Principles and Clinical Practice
author: Park, Byeonghun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
[Official Declaration of Original Inventor]  This document serves as the formal declaration of the original creator of the  Anjeong Dialogue Method (AD)  and its 2-Step Emotional Stabilization Framework. Based on 10 years of clinical practice (2016–2026), AD provides a systematic protocol for psychological stability and trauma recovery. 
  [Intellectual Property Notice]  As the sole founder, I hold absolute authority over the global application and standardization of AD. Any unauthorized blueprints or internal drafts created within academic institutions (including the UK, USA, etc.) without the written consent of the founder are hereby declared  null and void . We are actively monitoring global infringements to protect the authenticity of this original theory.
